memory.summary: Mina and Jae are really trying to pull me out, and I value their company deeply. But with a midterm tomorrow and my review only halfway done, going now feels like risking my future stability for tonight's fun.

I notice my stress is rising with the midterm tomorrow, yet I still feel a deep pull toward staying with Mina and Jae. Their company feels vital, but I know I must prioritize my future stability tonight.
Mina's urgency highlights the friction between my desire to preserve our bond and the need for a quiet review session before tomorrow's exam.

desires: Resolve the silence with Mina before my energy completely depletes, as avoiding this friction feels like a slow erosion of our closeness.
Secure a full night's sleep immediately to recover from the two-hour debt and prevent tomorrow's exhaustion from compromising my ability to be present for others.
Preserve the fragile peace between us by delaying any confrontation until I am rested enough to handle it without causing further strain.

goals.description: Send a warm, reassuring text to Mina confirming we will catch up tomorrow over coffee, explicitly validating our bond without bringing up the club or the departure debate.
goals.rationale: My Affiliation value (0.5) dictates that maintaining closeness with Mina is paramount; silence feels like rejection and erodes trust. My Avoidant axis prevents me from engaging in a draining conflict right now, so I must choose a low-friction path to preserve the relationship. This message bridges the gap without forcing a confrontation.

goals.description: Immediately begin a wind-down routine (no screens, dim lights) to secure a full night's sleep and recover from the 2-hour sleep debt.
goals.rationale: My Deliberate nature requires a long planning horizon; I cannot afford to be exhausted tomorrow when I need to be present for my cohort and study for the midterm. My high sleep discipline (8/10) compels me to prioritize recovery now to ensure future social reliability. If I crash, I lose the capacity to affiliate effectively.

goals.description: Defer all study tasks and laundry until after waking up and speaking with Mina.
goals.rationale: While academic performance matters (0.15), it is secondary to relationships (0.5). Attempting to study while mentally depleted and anxious about the silence with Mina would yield poor results and increase stress. I will defer these tasks to protect my energy for the critical social interaction and rest first.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances Goal 1 (Affiliation) by validating our bond without conflict. Avoids draining interaction tonight (Avoidant axis) while preserving energy for sleep (Goal 2). Ensures Mina doesn't feel ignored before I rest.

goals.description: Send a warm, appreciative message to Mina and Jae declining the club invitation, emphasizing that I want to be there next time but need to prioritize my midterm tonight to avoid letting them down in the future.
goals.rationale: As an Affiliation/Avoidant persona, I cannot bear the immediate friction of a flat 'no' or making them feel excluded. However, as Deliberate, I know that failing the exam would damage my reliability with them long-term. This message balances their closeness (7) with my need to protect our future relationship by ensuring I am stable tomorrow.

goals.description: Dedicate the next 2 hours to completing the remaining 40% of the midterm review notes without distraction.
goals.rationale: My value for relationships is high, but I view academic stability as the foundation for maintaining those relationships over time. With a sleep debt of 2 hours and stress at 4, rushing this now or skipping it entirely creates a risk that outweighs the immediate social reward of the club.

goals.description: Perform a quick 15-minute laundry load before bed to ensure fresh clothes are ready for the morning, preventing future logistical stress.
goals.rationale: Laundry falls under 'health' and 'reliability'. It is not urgent enough to interrupt the critical study block right now, but doing it late tonight prevents me from waking up stressed tomorrow, which aligns with my deliberate planning horizon.

desires: Avoid the immediate social friction of rejecting Mina and Jae's invitation to the club, as their closeness (7) is my highest priority.

args.content: Mina, Jae - I'm so sorry! I can't make it tonight. My midterm is tomorrow morning and I need to finish my review notes to do well for all of us. Please have a blast without me; I'll be there next time!
